title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
abstract: Arena is the go-to platform for AI professionals worldwide, ranking and benchmarking machine learning models with unparalleled accuracy and transparency to drive innovation and optimization.
abstract_zh: 想当AI界的大佬吗？Arena就是你的不二选择！它把全世界的机器学习模型都排名起来，还给它们做公正透明的评估，让你能一眼看出哪个最牛逼。靠着这个平台，不仅能推动创新，还能优化算法，简直是大神们的福音啊！
